title: campium rawsonii
intro: Campium rawsonii, also known as Rawson's Campion, is a plant species native to Chile and Argentina. This plant is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Campium rawsonii include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune system function. Herbal preparations of Campium rawsonii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe sore throats and calm digestive issues.
